title: Mock Test 31 - There is/There are
description: এই টেস্টে There is/There are নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন রয়েছে। প্রথম কয়েকটি প্রশ্নে জানবো নিয়ম ও গঠন, তারপর fill in the blanks, error detection ও অনুবাদ দিয়ে উদাহরণ সহ শেখা। প্রতিটি প্রশ্নের বাংলা অর্থ ও বিস্তারিত ব্যাখ্যা দেওয়া আছে।

questions.question: 'There is' কখন ব্যবহার করা হয়?
options: Singular noun ও uncountable noun-এর সাথে
questions.explanation: 'There is' ব্যবহার হয় singular noun (There is a book) এবং uncountable noun (There is some water) এর সাথে। 'There are' = plural noun-এর জন্য।

questions.question: 'There are' কখন ব্যবহার করা হয়?
questions.explanation: 'There are' = plural noun-এর সাথে ব্যবহৃত হয়। যেমন: There are many books. There are five students. There are some apples.

questions.question: 'There is' এর negative form কী?
questions.explanation: 'There is' এর negative = There is not / There isn't। যেমন: There isn't any water. / There is not a single star in the sky.

questions.question: 'There is/There are'-এর interrogative (প্রশ্নবোধক) form কী?
questions.explanation: Question: Is there + singular? / Are there + plural? যেমন: Is there a bank near here? Are there any restaurants nearby?

questions.question: 'There is/There are' দিয়ে কী বোঝায়?
questions.explanation: 'There is/There are' = কোনো কিছুর অস্তিত্ব (existence) বা উপস্থিতি (presence) বোঝাতে ব্যবহৃত হয়। যেমন: There is a book on the table. (টেবিলে একটি বই আছে - টেবিলে বইটির উপস্থিতি বোঝাচ্ছে)

questions.question: ___ a beautiful garden in front of our house. (আমাদের বাড়ির সামনে একটি সুন্দর বাগান আছে)
questions.explanation: 'A garden' = singular noun → 'There is'। 'There is a beautiful garden in front of our house.'

questions.question: ___ many students in the classroom. (ক্লাসরুমে অনেক ছাত্র আছে)
questions.explanation: 'Many students' = plural noun → 'There are'। 'There are many students in the classroom.'

questions.question: ___ some milk in the fridge. (ফ্রিজে কিছু দুধ আছে)
questions.explanation: 'Milk' = uncountable noun → 'There is'। 'There is some milk in the fridge.'

questions.question: ___ a book on the table? (টেবিলে কি একটা বই আছে?)
questions.explanation: Question → 'Is there + singular noun?' 'Is there a book on the table?'

questions.question: ___ any restaurants near here? (এখানকার কাছে কোনো রেস্টুরেন্ট আছে কি?)
questions.explanation: 'Any restaurants' = plural → 'Are there'। 'Are there any restaurants near here?'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'There is many books on the shelf.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Many books' = plural → 'There are' হবে, 'There is' নয়। সঠিক: 'There are many books on the shelf.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'There are a cat in the garden.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'A cat' = singular → 'There is' হবে, 'There are' নয়। সঠিক: 'There is a cat in the garden.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'Is there any apples in the basket?' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Any apples' = plural → 'Are there' হবে। সঠিক: 'Are there any apples in the basket?'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'There is some books on my desk.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Some books' = plural → 'There are' হবে। সঠিক: 'There are some books on my desk.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'There ___ no water in the bottle.' (বোতলে কোনো পানি নেই)
questions.explanation: 'Water' = uncountable → 'There is no water.' (No = not any)

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'There ___ a hospital and two schools in this area.' (এই এলাকায় একটি হাসপাতাল ও দুটি স্কুল আছে)
questions.explanation: যখন 'There is/are'-এর পরে প্রথম noun singular হয়, তখন 'There is' ব্যবহার হয়। 'There is a hospital and two schools.' (Proximity rule)

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'There ___ two schools and a hospital in this area.' (এই এলাকায় দুটি স্কুল ও একটি হাসপাতাল আছে)
questions.explanation: প্রথম noun plural (two schools) → 'There are'। 'There are two schools and a hospital.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: 'There ___ anyone in the room.' (রুমে কেউ নেই)
questions.explanation: 'Anyone' = singular → 'There isn't anyone.' (There is not anyone / There is no one)

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'আমার ব্যাগে একটা কলম আছে।'
options: There are a pen in my bag.
There is a pen in my bag.
It is a pen in my bag.
My bag has a pen there.
questions.explanation: 'A pen' = singular → 'There is'। 'There is a pen in my bag.'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক ইংরেজি অনুবাদ কোনটি? 'এলাকায় কি কোনো ভালো স্কুল আছে?'
options: Is there any good school in the area?
Are there any good school in the area?
There is any good school in the area?
Has there any good school in the area?
questions.explanation: 'Any good school' = singular → 'Is there'। 'Is there any good school in the area?'
